DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE AUG-22-2023 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT TEIMURAZOV VYACHESLAV'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 1, 2023. BECAUSE THE MOTION WAS FILED AND SERVED ON AUGUST 4, THERE ARE NOT 16 COURT DAYS (NOT CALENDAR DAYS) BETWEEN FILING AND THE NOTICE OF MOTION. CCP 1005(B). THE ORIGINAL SCHEDULED DATE ALSO DID NOT ACCOUNT FOR THE 2 COURT DAY EXTENSION FOR ELECTRONIC SERVICE. CCP 1010.6. THE NEW DATE ACCOUNTS FOR BOTH OF THESE STATUTES. THE PARTIES SHOULD MEET AND CONFER AND REQUEST A NEW HEARING DATE IF THEY WOULD PREFER A DIFFERENT DATE. JUDGE PRO TEM: SCOTT BORROWMAN; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

NOTICE OF MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER
Off Calendar Sep-14-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance via Zoom:
Mark W. Shem, Esq. of Borton Petrini LLP, Tel. 408.535.0870, for Defendant Vyacheslav;
No other appearance by any other party or counsel.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT TEIMURAZOV VYACHESLAV'S NOTICE OF MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER.

Defendant stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for defendant (appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter called. There being no other appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

No opposition filed; motion granted.

Mr. Shem is to prepare a proposed form of order that repeats verbatim the tentative ruling and email it to Judge Pro Tem McDonald at davididaho14@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Not Present. Matter not reported. (JPT/302)

NOTICE OF MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER
Off Calendar Sep-01-2023 Continued To Sep-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

RE: Defendant's MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. The matter is continued to September 14, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. on the court's motion. Recusal by Judge Pro Tem Aaron Minnis.

Judge Pro Tem: Aaron Minnis. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)

MINI MINUTES:

DEFENDANT JAMES RIVER INSURANCE'S Motion To Intervene. JAMES RIVER INSURANCE'S unopposed motion to intervene is granted. Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)

Off Calendar Aug-22-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2-DEFENDANT TEIMURAZOV VYACHESLAV'S Motion For Protective Order. Transferred to be heard on the court's discovery calendar (room 301) on the same date at 9:00 a.m. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)

NOTICE OF MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER
Off Calendar Aug-22-2023 Continued To Sep-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT TEIMURAZOV VYACHESLAV'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion continued to September 1, 2023. Because the motion was filed and served on August 4, there are not 16 court days (not calendar days) between filing and the notice of motion. CCP 1005(b). The original scheduled date also did not account for the 2 court day extension for electronic service. CCP 1010.6. The new date accounts for both of these statutes. The parties should meet and confer and request a new hearing date if they would prefer a different date.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
